_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Implement Risk Management Framework (RMF) Assessment requirements for control systems, and document/maintain records for them.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-009 (RM, cosine: 0.525), SP-K-009 (SP, cosine: 0.504).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.570). Shared vocabulary: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only terms [assessment, control, document, implement, maintain, records] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.856 (P=0.847, R=0.864). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (98.6%). "Implement Risk Management Framework (RMF) Assessment requirements for control sy" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.573 ≈ STS 0.570 (gap 0.003). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [framework, management, risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.8%. Shared tokens: [framework, management, risk]. DCWF-only: [assessment, control, document, implement, maintain, records]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, escalation, exception].
